description: Legal query ("...yuftīna sayyidunā fī dhālika..."). In Judaeo-Arabic. Concerning a woman who had to move with a man (presumably her husband), apparently against her will. Damaged and faded, but further details can likely be extracted. On verso there is a liturgical text in Hebrew (same hand as verso of T-S AS 145.115). (Information in part from CUDL.) Join: Alan Elbaum.
description_he: שאלה משפטית ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
